notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Ian Happ out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field. Seiya Suzuki scores.

notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly plunked
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly hit by pitch. Michael Conforto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pirates challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Pirates challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, first baseman Michael Busch to shortstop Dansby Swanson to pitcher Phil Maton. Endy Rodríguez out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.
